# Figure description: Условные_обозначения.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Общие_данные_для_всех_листов/Условные_обозначения.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **geological map legend sheet** (лист условных обозначений к геологическим картам — "Legend Sheet for Geological Maps"), designated as **Чертёж XI** (Drawing/Figure XI). It is a comprehensive reference sheet accompanying 1:200,000 scale geological maps, containing stratigraphic, lithological, structural, and intrusive rock symbols along with a geological age correlation table.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The legend sheet covers the full range of geological units depicted on the regional geological maps of the survey area in **northern Kazakhstan** (map sheets **M-42** and **N-42**). It encompasses:

- Stratigraphic units from **Quaternary (Q)** down through **Precambrian/Archean** basement
- Intrusive rock complexes
- Structural symbols (faults, unconformities, dip indicators)
- A **geological age correlation table** (верхний правый угол — upper right corner) spanning from **Salairian (Салаирский)** through **Late Caledonian (Позднекаледонский)** and **Late Hercynian (Позднегерцинский)** orogenic cycles
- Borehole symbols for surface maps and cross-sections
- Paleontological and biostratigraphic marker symbols

---

## Key Content

### Stratigraphic/Lithological Units (left and center columns):

The legend systematically lists rock units from youngest to oldest, each with a colored or patterned rectangular symbol:

**Cenozoic–Mesozoic:**
- **Quaternary (Q)** — alluvial, lacustrine, proluvial, eolian deposits; clays, sands, gravels, loams
- **Neogene–Paleogene** — continental clastic sequences
- **Cretaceous** — variegated clays, sandstones, aleurolites (siltstones), conglomerates

**Paleozoic sedimentary sequences:**
- **Carboniferous (C)** — multiple subdivisions (C₁, C₂, C₃): limestones, dolomites, sandstones, aleurolites, cherts, organogenic-detrital limestones, volcanic-sedimentary associations; the **Karbon** section is extensively subdivided with suites (свиты)
- **Devonian (D)** — sandstones, aleurolites, conglomerates, volcanic rocks of intermediate composition
- **Silurian (S)** — limestones, aleurolites, sandstones
- **Ordovician (O)** — terrigenous-carbonate sequences
- **Cambrian (Є)** — metamorphic-sedimentary complexes
- **Precambrian (PR, AR)** — crystalline schists, gneisses, marbles, quartzites

**Volcanic and sub-volcanic units:**
- Volcanic rocks of **basic, intermediate, and acidic composition** — lavas and tuffs (shown with distinctive ornamental patterns including dots, triangles, and wavy lines)
- Тuфоконгломераты (tuffconglomerates), tuffites

### Intrusive Complexes (center-right column — Девонские, Силурийские, and other):
- **Granitoids** — normal-series granites, leucocratic granites, granodiorites (γ, γδ symbols)
- **Diorites, monzodiorites** (δ symbols)
- **Gabbro-diorites, gabbro** (ν symbols)
- **Dyke bodies** — diabases, aplites, syenite-dykes
- **Ultrabasic rocks** — serpentinized bodies
- **Porphyries** ("порфировидные", "криптопорфировидные")
- Limestone bodies with chert nodules
- Limestone-conglomerate sequences

### Structural Symbols (right-center section — "Разрывные нарушения"):

**Fault categories:**
- **Главные и уходящие в фундамент разломы** — Main faults extending into basement (bold solid lines)
- **По геологическим данным** — Established by geological data
- **Предполагаемые по геологическим данным** — Inferred from geological data
- **Предполагаемые под слоем молодых отложений** — Inferred beneath young cover
- **Взбросо-надвиги с формированием структур верхнего палеозоя** — Reverse faults/thrusts forming Upper Paleozoic structures
- **Предполагаемые под толщей молодых отложений** — Assumed under Cenozoic cover
- **Пласты известняков, просложенные и стратиформированные по контактной печати** — Limestone beds traced by contact printing

**Metamorphic/metasomatic zones:**
- Пластоморфоза, гланитисты (plasmorphosis, gneisses)
- Милониты, катаклазиты (mylonites, cataclasites)
- Силициты (silicites)
- Брекчиевидно-скарнировидные (breccia-like skarn-like)
- Скарновые (skarns)

**Ore body types (Пласты алевролитов, несущих):**
- **Красноцветные** (red-colored)
- **Зеленоцветные в сероцветных** (green in grey)
- Зеленоцветные в конгломератах и гравелитах (green in conglomerates/gravelites)
- Красноцветные (additional subdivisions)
- Зеленоцветные и сероцветные (green and grey)

**Volcanic rock slabs:**
- Пласты вулканогенно-осадочных пород (volcanic-sedimentary rock slabs)
- Пласты ружных (rhyolitic?)
- Граниты среднее- и крупнозернистые (medium- and coarse-grained granites)
